purpose: Framework for building agents and LLM-powered applications, providing standard interfaces for models, embeddings, and vector stores.

key_files.name: LICENSE
key_files.role: MIT License text defining copyright and usage terms.

key_files.name: README.md
key_files.role: Project overview, quickstart guide, and ecosystem links.

purpose: Monorepo directory for LangChain core packages, integrations, and utilities.

key_files.name: README.md
key_files.role: Describes monorepo structure and lists packages (core, langchain, partners, etc.).

key_files.name: Makefile
key_files.role: Defines targets to lock dependencies across multiple packages (core, text-splitters, langchain).

key_files.name: text-splitters/pyproject.toml
key_files.role: Defines project metadata, dependencies, and tool configurations for text splitters.

key_files.name: text-splitters/Makefile
key_files.role: Orchestrates build, lint, test, and type checking for text splitters.

key_files.name: text-splitters/extended_testing_deps.txt
key_files.role: Lists additional test dependencies (lxml, beautifulsoup4) for extended testing.

concerns: External test group `test_integration` defines a dependency on `en-core-web-sm` model wheel requiring download.
Additional constraint dependency `pygments` added to address CVE-2026-4539.

purpose: Defines GitHub repository configuration, automation rules, and contribution guidelines including CODEOWNERS, Dependabot settings, PR templates, and workflow scripts.

key_files.name: CODEOWNERS
key_files.role: Assigns repository owners to specific file paths.

key_files.name: dependabot.yml
key_files.role: Configures automated dependency update schedules and grouping for multiple ecosystems.

key_files.name: PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md
key_files.role: Standardizes PR submission format and contribution instructions.

key_files.name: workflows/auto-label-by-package.yml
key_files.role: Labels issues automatically based on the 'Package' selection in the issue body.

key_files.name: workflows/check_agents_sync.yml
key_files.role: Verifies that CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md contain identical content.

concerns: Regex in auto-labeling workflow depends on specific markdown headers (## Package) which may break if the issue template changes.

purpose: Configuration for a VS Code development container environment using Docker Compose to build and run LangChain locally without local tool installation.

key_files.name: README.md
key_files.role: User documentation for dev container usage, setup, and tips.

key_files.name: devcontainer.json
key_files.role: Primary dev container configuration defining service, mounts, and VS Code customizations.

key_files.name: docker-compose.yaml
key_files.role: Docker Compose file defining the langchain service build and network configuration.

concerns: Forwarded ports are disabled (commented out) in devcontainer.json.
Running as root is disabled by default in devcontainer.json.
